name: Apfeltorte (Apple Cake)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup butter or margarine (plus 2 tbsp, divided)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and core the apples.
2. In a small saucepan, combine raisins, rum or rum extract, 1 tablespoon of sugar, and grated chocolate. Bring to boil. Set aside while preparing the batter.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Lightly grease the bottom of a 10½-inch springform pan.
5. Cream together 3/4 cup butter or margarine, 3/4 cup sugar, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
6. Beat in eggs one at a time, then add lemon extract. Beat until well combined.
7. Sift together flour, baking powder, and cinnamon. Gradually beat into the creamed mixture.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan and arrange apples on top.
9. Fill apple centers with raisin mixture.
10. Dot with 2 teaspoons of butter.
11. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
12. Sprinkle with a mixture of ground almonds and remaining 2 tablespoons sugar.
13. Continue baking for 10 to 15 minutes longer until apples are tender.
14. Remove from oven.
15. Brush jam over the apple opening and sprinkle icing sugar over the cake portion.
